title: MineColonies: Block Party
description: Variety of Musical Stylings to Enhance your Minecraft Experience!

![overview](https://i.imgur.com/KAzUIKf.png)


This mod is an addon to MineColonies with my own musical stylings in craftable disc format.



Made for MineColonies: Dimensional Adventure

![features](https://i.imgur.com/thj37Oq.png)

The mods goal is to add 75 varieties of musical flavors to enhance your minecraft experience.



All Recipes can be viewed by using Just Enough Items.


You are free to use this in your modpacks!

Wanna Help Support Me?
